---
title: "Home"
---

<div class="hero">

# Briana Maximino  

**Future Sports Marketing Strategist**

Marketing student focused on sports marketing, brand strategy, and consumer engagement analytics.

<div class="hero-buttons">
<a href="projects.html" class="btn-primary">View Portfolio</a>
<a href="resume.html" class="btn-secondary">View Resume</a>
</div>

</div>

---

## Strategic Focus

I explore how organizations build strong brand relevance and consumer engagement through data-driven strategy, behavioral insight, and campaign development.

My main interests include:

- Sports marketing  
- Brand strategy  
- Consumer analytics  
- Campaign planning  

---

## Featured Work

<div class="project-grid">

<div class="project-card">
<h3>LA Galaxy Campaign</h3>
<p>Gen Z engagement and experiential sports marketing strategy.</p>
<a href="projects.html#la-galaxy">View Project →</a>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<h3>Tesla Strategy Analysis</h3>
<p>Corporate strategy and management initiative evaluation.</p>
<a href="projects.html#tesla">View Project →</a>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<h3>Google Organizational Study</h3>
<p>Organizational structure and strategic leadership insights.</p>
<a href="projects.html#google">View Project →</a>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<h3>Super Soaker Brand</h3>
<p>Student-run marketing business focused on campus services.</p>
<a href="projects.html#super-soaker">View Project →</a>
</div>

</div>

---

## Career Direction

I aim to contribute strategic thinking and analytical support within sports and consumer-focused marketing teams.

My long-term goal is to work in sports marketing where brand storytelling, fan engagement, and performance analytics intersect.
